reviews.review_description: Just stuck by steps with foot steps sound want let me go in

When using the touch pad to walk why not make it so you just hold the touch pad and walk forward automatically or maybe possibly just use the gear vr controller and was hoping for a little more depth to the game maybe something similar to Play With Me the ghosts don't really follow you around and opening doors is difficult and seems like the game could use a bit of polish your video shows almost a different game with nicer graphics a little misleading I'll be checking on this game you definitely have an interesting idea hopefully with some tweaking you'll have something cool to show.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

We just update the game so please wait some it will live soon and then let us know and also for walking straight you have touch up, for walking back you need to touch down, For walking right and Left you need touch left and right in touchpad. We make control like this because in our game you need to find key and for that you need to open Almira, drawers etc.

Thanks

reviews.review_description: Horrible controlls, terrible camera, little content for a paid game, bad visuals.  Cannot recommend to anyone.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Can you please tell me exact issues?

Thanks

reviews.review_title: I should have read the Reviews.
reviews.review_description: I like scary games on the Oculus, but this one is "Pure-D" garbage, there is practically no movement.  I have to constantly use the touchpad, yet I barely move anywhere, there is no other controls in the game.  Would like to get my money back, but as others haven't been refunded, I suppose that I wont be either.  You should pay us to download this crap.
Tried to play the game, it glitches and whats worse not scary at all. DON"T WASTE MONEY ! want to get scared, play AFFECTED or DREADHALLS. sorry guys but it didn't impress me.

developer_response.body: Sorry if this is the issue, can you please give us some time to fix it!

reviews.review_description: I paid for this and it doesn't even work

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Can you please uninstall and reinstall it again so it will work for sure.

Thanks

reviews.review_description: Waste of money   Doesn’t work on my Go. Wish I could give zero stars.
Would not install for vr oculus
Just downloaded this game for the kids and it won't go beyond the start screen. Using touchpad, but there doesn't seem to be any control or movement method. Going to delete it now.
I buy this is no work ? I need help
